mapper.select: SELECT m.user_id AS userId, m.password, m.ROLE AS role, m.status, m.tel, m.reg_date AS regDate, m.last_login AS lastLogin, m.previous_payment AS previousPayment, m.out_date AS outDate, c.com_name AS comName FROM member m LEFT JOIN company c ON m.user_id = c.user_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userid}
